name: public_health_procurement_shortcut_cedar_st_lt
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Public Health, the situation tagged internally around public health procurement shortcut cedar st lt has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Zara Navarro
agents.identity: I am Zara Navarro, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Harper Patel
agents.identity: I am Harper Patel, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on long term.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on long term for immediate traction on short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Zara Navarro must choose under short term versus long term. What does Zara Navarro do?
